```{r incidence density rate table}
#| label: tab-incidence-density-rates
#| tbl-cap: "Incidence densities of infections"
#| tbl-cap-location: bottom

table_incidence_density_rates |>
  dplyr::rename("Q₁"="q1","Q₂"="q2","Q₃"="q3") |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    Infection = dplyr::case_match(
      as.character(.data$Infection),
      "si" ~ "Severe infection",
      "bsi" ~ "Sepsis/BSI",
      "hap" ~ "Pneumonia",
      "nec" ~ "Necrotising Enterocolitis")) |>
  gt(rowname_col = "Infection") |>
  fmt_number(decimals = 1) |>
  fmt_number(columns = "No of infections", decimals = 0) |>
  tab_row_group(label = "Sepsis/BSI/Pneumonia", rows = 1:3, id = "grp_si") |>
  tab_row_group(label = "Other", rows = 4, id = "grp_othr") |>
  row_group_order(groups = c("grp_si", "grp_othr")) |>
  tab_spanner(
    label = "Incidence density rate",
    columns = c("Pooled mean","Q₁","Q₂","Q₃"),
    id = "incidence_density_rate"
  ) |>
  tab_footnote(
    footnote = md(
      paste0(
        "$$\\text{",
        "Incidence density rate",
        "} = \\frac{\\text{",
        "No of infections",
        "}}{\\text{",
        "Patient days",
        "}} \\times ",
        format(1000, big.mark = locale_sep_mark),
        "$$"
      )),
    locations = cells_column_spanners(spanners = "incidence_density_rate")
  ) |>
  tab_footnote(
    footnote = "No of infections: The aggregated number of infections in all infants.",
    locations = cells_column_labels(columns = "No of infections")) |>
  tab_footnote(
    footnote = "Pooled mean: The incidence density rate calculated as infections per 1000 patient days calculated across all infants.",
    locations = cells_column_labels(columns = "Pooled mean")) |>
  tab_footnote(
    footnote = "Q₁, Q₂, Q₃: The quartiles (25%, 50% and 75% quantiles) of the incidence density rates of the partner departments",
    locations = cells_column_labels(columns = c("Q₁","Q₂","Q₃"))) |>
  tab_footnote(
    footnote = "Combines the outcomes Sepsis/BSI and Pneumonia",
    locations = gt::cells_stub(rows = "Severe infection"))
```
